title: Design guidelines link not working in app submission form

posts.author: YashGarg (Yash Garg)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Team,

The design guidelines link given in App Submission form is not working. This is the link - monday.com | A new way of working

When I open it in normal browser it is getting redirected to {slug}.monday.com, and if opened in incognito, it is opening monday.com only. Can you please provide me with the correct link as I want to submit my app, and need to create images/icons for it.

Thanks

Screenshot 2024-02-08 at 4.29.35 PM1166×794 44.3 KB

posts.author: kolaai (alfred)
posts.cookedHtml: Here is the correct link - monday.com | a new way of working

posts.author: YashGarg (Yash Garg)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks a lot for sharing the link

posts.author: rachelatmonday (Rachel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @YashGarg,

Thanks for letting us know. I’ve sent this to the app review team to check it out!

Best,
Rachel
